case_title: ELMA R. MCDANIEL VS. CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDANIEL, ELMA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC. $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDANIEL, ELMA R. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-07-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,883.39 RE 35869 FOR TRANSACTION W0519404D013 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO ELMA R MCDANIEL, DOC #1909805313, WARRANT #38205891, DATED MAY-13-2019
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY MCDANIEL, ELMA R. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY MCDANIEL, ELMA R. CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF ELMA R. MCDANIEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEMS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NAZEM HEMRAJANI CORP. OFFICER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO JUDGE PROTEM HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S SIGNED REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED AND FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDANIEL, ELMA R.

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING SYSTEM, INC.
